message:
test(fcp-core): pin UsageMetricKind + PrerequisiteKind serde matrix (flywheel_connectors-oglwe)

Bead asks for SignerKind serde tag JSON+CBOR roundtrip. fcp-core
has no type literally named SignerKind; the closest "signer kind"
classifier is ManifestSignature (signer-algorithm tag at
connector_artifacts.rs:302) which is already pinned by 8tf1r in
manifest_signature_serde_tags.rs. The <Foo>Kind naming pattern
covers four classifier enums, two unpinned for serde matrix:
- UsageMetricKind (protocol.rs:1095, 6 variants ApiCredits/Tokens/
  Bytes/DurationMs/Requests/Custom with rename_all snake_case +
  hand-written as_str)
- PrerequisiteKind (connector_descriptors.rs:389, 6 variants
  UserInput/SecretInput/LaunchUrl/Oauth/Webhook/CredentialPersistence
  with rename_all snake_case)

Coverage:
- UsageMetricKind per-variant JSON tag (api_credits/tokens/bytes/
  duration_ms/requests/custom) with usage-telemetry filter
  regression sentinel
- UsageMetricKind::as_str agrees with serde tag byte-for-byte (drift
  silently produces two different operator-facing tokens for the
  same metric)
- JSON + CBOR round-trip per variant
- CBOR encodes as Text (cross-language consumers)
- Multi-word variants use underscore (api_credits, duration_ms NOT
  apiCredits/durationMs/api-credits/apicredits)
- PascalCase + camelCase + kebab-case + unknown rejected
- PrerequisiteKind per-variant JSON tag (user_input/secret_input/
  launch_url/oauth/webhook/credential_persistence) with multi-word
  underscore enforcement
- PrerequisiteKind JSON + CBOR round-trip per variant
- PrerequisiteKind PascalCase + camelCase + unknown rejected
- Pairwise distinctness within each enum
- 6-variant count sentinel for both
- Cross-enum: UsageMetricKind and PrerequisiteKind use disjoint
  token spaces (operator dashboards reading both streams MUST be
  able to disambiguate by token alone)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
